name: Infinite Moving Cards
description: An infinitely scrolling horizontal carousel of cards that moves automatically with a seamless loop, ideal for testimonials or logos.
whenToUse: Use for testimonials, client logos, partner showcases, or any content that benefits from a continuously scrolling horizontal feed.

props.name: items
props.type: { quote: string; name: string; title: string }[]
props.description: Array of items to display in the carousel

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Whether to pause the animation on hover
